  Fetches a single PDND client by ID.

# pdnd_client (Data Source)

Fetches a single PDND client by its UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_client" "example" {
  id = "cc0e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440040"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Client UUID

### Read-Only

- `consumer_id` (String) Consumer UUID
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `description` (String) Client description
- `name` (String) Client name
